input.issue_title: getOneObjectWhere:orderBy生成的SQL语句,limit应放在order by之后
input.issue_body:
### The language of WCDB

> Objective-C

### The version of WCDB

> v1.0.6

### The platform of WCDB

> iOS

### The installation of WCDB

> Cocoapods

### What's the issue?

> 使用 - (id )getOneObjectWhere:(const WCTCondition &)condition
                                 orderBy:(const WCDB::OrderList &)order
> 出现如下错误:
>  [WCDB][ERROR]Code:1, Type:SQLite, Tag:0, Op:3, ExtCode:1, Msg:near "ORDER": syntax error, SQL:SELECT xxx,xxx,xxx,xxx FROM xxx WHERE (ixxx=0) LIMIT 1 ORDER BY xxx DESC,xx DESC
>  limit应该放在order by之后

input.issue_title: Linking error when build wcdb on linux x86 64-bit
input.issue_body:
The language of WCDB

> C++

The version of WCDB

> v2.1.11

The platform of WCDB

> Ubuntu 22.04.5 LTS 64-bit

The installation of WCDB

> Git clone

What's the issue?

> Linking error when build wcdb on linux x86 64-bit.


Run command to build wcdb:
```
git clone https://github.com/Tencent/wcdb.git
cd wcdb
git submodule update --init --recursive
mkdir build && cd build
cmake ../src
make
```

Linking error output:
> [ 95%] Linking CXX shared library libWCDB.so
> ld: error: /home/sim/ZiiPin-Repo/sim-core/wcdb/src/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/arm64/libcrypto.a(evp_enc.o) is incompatible with elf64-x86-64
> ld: error: /home/sim/ZiiPin-Repo/sim-core/wcdb/src/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/arm64/libcrypto.a(evp_lib.o) is incompatible with elf64-x86-64
> ld: error: /home/sim/ZiiPin-Repo/sim-core/wcdb/src/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/arm64/libcrypto.a(m_sha1.o) is incompatible with elf64-x86-64
> ld: error: /home/sim/ZiiPin-Repo/sim-core/wcdb/src/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/arm64/libcrypto.a(names.o) is incompatible with elf64-x86-64
> ld: error: /home/sim/ZiiPin-Repo/sim-core/wcdb/src/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/arm64/libcrypto.a(p5_crpt2.o) is incompatible with elf64-x86-64
> ld: error: /home/sim/ZiiPin-Repo/sim-core/wcdb/src/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/arm64/libcrypto.a(hmac.o) is incompatible with elf64-x86-64
> ld: error: /home/sim/ZiiPin-Repo/sim-core/wcdb/src/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/arm64/libcrypto.a(obj_dat.o) is incompatible with elf64-x86-64
> ld: error: /home/sim/ZiiPin-Repo/sim-core/wcdb/src/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/arm64/libcrypto.a(rand_lib.o) is incompatible with elf64-x86-64
> ld: error: /home/sim/ZiiPin-Repo/sim-core/wcdb/src/../tools/prebuild/zlib/linux/arm64/libz.a(crc32.o) is incompatible with elf64-x86-64
> collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status
> make[2]: *** [wcdb/CMakeFiles/WCDB.dir/build.make:4403: wcdb/libWCDB.so] Error 1
> make[1]: *** [CMakeFiles/Makefile2:274: wcdb/CMakeFiles/WCDB.dir/all] Error 2
> make:

ground_truth.diff:
commit d5e11d632d3e6ebdcb39c096e8b379f7be843e6b
Author: watergear <watergear@gmail.com>
Date:   Fri Jun 6 11:23:20 2025 +0800

    fix linking error when build wcdb on linux x86 64-bit (issue #1391).

diff --git a/src/CMakeLists.txt b/src/CMakeLists.txt
index ec9d5491..78db7d49 100644
--- a/src/CMakeLists.txt
+++ b/src/CMakeLists.txt
@@ -429,18 +429,21 @@ else ()
             target_link_directories(${TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/android_old/${CMAKE_ANDROID_ARCH}/lib)
             target_include_directories(sqlcipher PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/android_old/${CMAKE_ANDROID_ARCH}/include)
             target_link_directories(sqlcipher PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/android_old/${CMAKE_ANDROID_ARCH}/lib)
         elseif(LINUX)
             target_include_directories(sqlcipher PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/include)
-            target_link_directories(sqlcipher PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/arm64)
-            target_link_directories(sqlcipher PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/x86_64)
             target_include_directories(${TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/include)
-            target_link_directories(${TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/arm64)
-            target_link_directories(${TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/x86_64)
             target_include_directories(${TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/zlib/include)
-            target_link_directories(${TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/zlib/linux/arm64)
-            target_link_directories(${TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/zlib/linux/x86_64)
+            if (${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR} STREQUAL "x86_64")
+                target_link_directories(sqlcipher PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/x86_64)
+                target_link_directories(${TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/x86_64)
+                target_link_directories(${TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/zlib/linux/x86_64)
+            elseif (${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR} STREQUAL "arm64")
+                target_link_directories(sqlcipher PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/arm64)
+                target_link_directories(${TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/linux/arm64)
+                target_link_directories(${TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/zlib/linux/arm64)
+            endif()
         elseif(WIN32)
             target_include_directories(sqlcipher PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/include)
             target_include_directories(${TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/openssl/include)
             target_include_directories(${TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/prebuild/zlib/include)
             if (CMAKE_SIZEOF_VOID_P EQUAL 8)

input.issue_title: Potential Wild Pointer Issue in releaseCPPObject and close Sequence
input.issue_body:
### Description

I encountered a native crash while using WCDB2 in my application. I suspect it might be related to a potential wild pointer issue in the sequence of releaseCPPObject and close calls. Below are the crash log details:

```
pid: 13509, tid: 13533, name: FinalizerDaemon  >>> com.tencent.wcdb.demo <<<
signal 11 (SIGSEGV), code 1 (SEGV_MAPERR), fault addr 0xffffff80000018
x0  ffffffff80000018  x1  0000006d77b274b8  x2  0000006ccb87f70c  x3  0000006d77b275f0
...
backtrace:
#00 pc 00000000001a01b4 /data/app/.../lib/arm64/libWCDB.so
WCDB::ObjectBridge::extractOriginalCPPObject(CPPObject const*) at ObjectBridge.cpp:0
#01 pc 00000000001a1b80 /data/app/.../lib/arm64/libWCDB.so
WCDBDatabaseClose at DatabaseBridge.cpp:103
```

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8e7045d4-59d5-4915-b5ab-d1c445b5f808)

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9f273410-13e3-4fe3-97e4-00984c94961c)

### Suspected Cause

The crash seems to occur when:
1. releaseCPPObject is called, potentially releasing the memory for cppObj.
2. After the memory is released, subsequent calls to close attempt to access the invalid pointer, resulting in a segmentation fault.

### Java Code

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7b2fb9a8-30c5-4b78-9f64-f0b19044d7d8)


### C++ Code

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/4d9aacf8-5661-461b-9765-48275f849947)


### Steps to Reproduce
1.  Use WCDB2 in an application with objects that have a long lifecycle (e.g., more than 4 hours).
2. Trigger finalize for a CppObject that has not been explicitly closed.
3. Observe the crash in native code.


### Proposed Solution

Since the object is being garbage collected, it is no longer necessary to call close during finalization. To prevent the crash, I modified the code as follows:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1ef93946-b052-4ba9-b767-6f786220e3ec)

With this change, cppObj is explicitly set to 0 after releaseCPPObject to avoid further access

input.pr_title: [feature] enable exeSql with readonly mode for performance and get the result of exeSql if needed
解决win平台 导出头文件在警告等级为W4情况下 编译报错问题.
input.pr_body: 解决win平台 在Visual studio, 警告等级为w4, 警告视为错误的编译条件下,导出头文件报错问题.
